ValidationRule.description: Prevents ALR users from selecting "N/A (Not Applicable)", "N/S (Not Assessed)", or "PHOCSNonCompliant" in the Result field for the ALR Inspection Assessment Indicator record type unless they have the EHIS Bypass Validation Rule Custom Permission.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "ALRInspectionAssessmentIndicator", NOT($Permission.EHISBypassValidationRuleCustomPermission), OR( ISPICKVAL(Result, "N/A (Not Applicable)"), ISPICKVAL(Result, "N/S (Not Assessed)"), ISPICKVAL(Result, "PHOCSNonCompliant") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can only select Compliant, Non-compliant, NA as Assessment Result. Please correct the value.
